page.introP1: Starting June 7, 2026, Metro is updating bus and rail service with changes designed to improve reliability for riders across the city.
page.introP2: Download a PDF summary of the latest updates in:

2.update: Travel time adjustments will be made to Weekday and Saturday schedules. Service reductions will include a limited number of trips where capacity significantly exceeds normal ridership levels, including the removal of one eastbound trip during the 5am weekday period.
2.reason: For improved reliability better reflecting actual travel times. For improved reliability better reflecting actual travel times. Reduction of trips to provide extra capacity and avoid consistent crowding.

28.update: Travel time adjustments will be made to Weekday and Saturday schedules. Service reductions will include a limited number of trips where capacity significantly exceeds normal ridership levels, including the removal of one eastbound trip during the 9am weekday period and one westbound trip during the 6pm weekday period.
28.reason: For improved reliability better reflecting actual travel times. For improved reliability better reflecting actual travel times. Reduction of trips to provide extra capacity and avoid consistent crowding.

48.update: Travel time adjustments will be made to Weekday and Saturday schedules. Three trips added: two southbound trips between 6:30 and 7:30am, and one northbound trip departing from San Pedro / Manchester at 8:45am.
48.reason: For improved reliability better reflecting actual travel times. Added trips to provide additional capacity and avoid consistent crowding.
48.arterials: Main St, South San Pedro St

51.update: Travel time adjustments will be made to Weekday, Saturday, and Sunday schedules. Weekday service reductions will occur due to frequency changes during the AM and PM peak periods in both directions, with frequency adjusted to 5.5–7.5-minute headways.
51.reason: For improved reliability better reflecting actual travel times. For improved reliability better reflecting actual travel times. Reduction of trips to provide extra capacity and avoid consistent crowding.
51.description: CSU Dominguez Hills - Westlake/MacArthur Park Station

204.update: Travel time adjustments will be made to Weekday and Saturday schedules. Weekday service reductions will occur due to frequency changes during the AM and PM peak periods in both directions, with frequency adjusted to 5.5–7.5-minute headways. Additional reductions include two weekday trips (6pm northbound and 7pm southbound) and one Saturday northbound trip during the 6pm period.
204.reason: For improved reliability better reflecting actual travel times. For improved reliability better reflecting actual travel times. Reduction of trips to provide extra capacity and avoid consistent crowding.
